---
title: "Data Representation and Computer Arithmetic"
subtitle: "Module 2 — BCSE205L"
author: "Justus Raju"
date: last-modified
---

## Outline

::: {.incremental}
- Fixed point arithmetic operations
- Booth's multiplication algorithm
- Modified Booth's algorithm
- Restoring division
- Non-restoring division
- Floating point arithmetic operations
- Representation of nonnumeric data (character codes)
:::

::: {.notes}
This module covers how data is represented in binary and the hardware algorithms used for arithmetic operations in a typical computer, including multiplication and division algorithms for both fixed and floating point numbers.
:::
